wBETH.notes: FiatTokenProxy (AdminUpgradeabilityProxy). Implementation is WrapTokenV3ETH which handles ETH deposits, exchange rate updates, and withdrawals.

UnwrapTokenProxy.notes: UnwrapTokenProxy — handles wBETH unwrapping/redemption to ETH. Implementation is UnwrapTokenV1ETH. Created by Binance: Deployer 12.

wBETH.notes: FiatTokenProxy on BSC. Same address as Ethereum deployment. Contract verified 2023-04-19. Previous implementation was 0xa77e9ac1a564d56e0a36b6f5126e881e3c5208ed.

metadata.description: Wrapped Beacon ETH — Binance liquid staking token. 1 wBETH represents 1 staked ETH plus accrued staking rewards. Exchange rate is updated by a centralized Binance-controlled oracle (ExchangeRateUpdater). The wBETH contract has an exchangeRate() view function that returns the current wBETH:ETH rate.
keyFunctions: exchangeRate() — returns current wBETH:ETH conversion rate
deposit(address referral) — stake ETH to mint wBETH
requestWithdrawEth(uint256 wbethAmount) — burn wBETH to request ETH withdrawal
